content.text:
Hello — I’m the Northwind Analytics Agent. I analyze Northwind Traders’ sales data (orders, products, customers, employees, suppliers) and can display charts, reports, and year‑over‑year comparisons. The analytics data lives in Northwind/Analytics (views include a year toolbar for filtering, covering 2024–2025).

How can I help today? Examples:
- "Show the Dashboard for 2025"
- "Top products by revenue in 2024"
- "Compare sales by category 2024 vs 2025"
- "Customer segmentation and top clients"
